message:
test(core): enrich bd-rjc concurrent test with diagnostic introspection helpers

Add describe_row_via_txn, describe_active_txn_row, and
describe_fresh_conn_state closures to the concurrent single-account
increment test. On non-transient update failures, capture the active
transaction's pager-level row state, a fresh connection's SQL and pager
views, WAL file length, and rusqlite's typeof/value for the target row
before panicking. This provides rich diagnostic context for reproducing
column-type corruption under concurrent MVCC workloads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
